name: Japanese Coach
subtitle: Local-first Japanese speaking practice
description: Practice spoken Japanese with your own Ollama-powered tutor running on your PC.

apps.name: Japanese Coach
apps.subtitle: Talk to your local Japanese AI coach
apps.localizedDescription: Hold to talk, get short Japanese replies, explain lines on demand, and shadow the last sentence.

versions.localizedDescription: Packages the final built app bundle instead of the intermediate skeleton, restoring modern fullscreen behavior and app resources.

privacy.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Japanese Coach needs the microphone so you can practice speaking Japanese aloud.
privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Japanese Coach connects to your PC on your local network to transcribe and answer your speech.
